'''bolagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:doctrinable|doctrinable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doctrinable|doctrinable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bolagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bolagithi|bolagithi]] || [[word:bolagiji|bolagiji]] || [[word:bolagishi|bolagishi]] || [[word:bolagiki|bolagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bolaguthuthu|bolaguthuthu]] || [[word:bolagujuju|bolagujuju]] || [[word:bolagushushu|bolagushushu]] || [[word:bolagukuku|bolagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bolaguthu|bolaguthu]] || [[word:bolaguju|bolaguju]] || [[word:bolagushu|bolagushu]] || [[word:bolaguku|bolaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bolagufthuf|bolagufthuf]] || [[word:bolagufjuf|bolagufjuf]] || [[word:bolagufshuf|bolagufshuf]] || [[word:bolagufkuf|bolagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bolagethe|bolagethe]] || [[word:bolageje|bolageje]] || [[word:bolageshe|bolageshe]] || [[word:bolageke|bolageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bolagothotho|bolagothotho]] || [[word:bolagojojo|bolagojojo]] || [[word:bolagoshosho|bolagoshosho]] || [[word:bolagokoko|bolagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bolagotho|bolagotho]] || [[word:bolagojo|bolagojo]] || [[word:bolagosho|bolagosho]] || [[word:bolagoko|bolagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bolagofthof|bolagofthof]] || [[word:bolagofjof|bolagofjof]] || [[word:bolagofshof|bolagofshof]] || [[word:bolagofkof|bolagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfthĂŻf|bolagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfjĂŻf|bolagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfshĂŻf|bolagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfkĂŻf|bolagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|bolagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|bolagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|bolagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|bolagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfthĂŻf|bolagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfjĂŻf|bolagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfshĂŻf|bolagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfkĂŻf|bolagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfthĂŻf|bolagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfjĂŻf|bolagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfshĂŻf|bolagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bolagĂŻfkĂŻf|bolagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bolagĂŠthĂŠ|bolagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bolagĂŠjĂŠ|bolagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bolagĂŠshĂŠ|bolagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bolagĂŠkĂŠ|bolagĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bolagathatha|bolagathatha]] || [[word:bolagajaja|bolagajaja]] || [[word:bolagashasha|bolagashasha]] || [[word:bolagakaka|bolagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bolagatha|bolagatha]] || [[word:bolagaja|bolagaja]] || [[word:bolagasha|bolagasha]] || [[word:bolagaka|bolagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bolagafthaf|bolagafthaf]] || [[word:bolagafjaf|bolagafjaf]] || [[word:bolagafshaf|bolagafshaf]] || [[word:bolagafkaf|bolagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bolagasha|bolagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bolagshĂ«sha|bolagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bolagrosha|bolagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bolagmusha|bolagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bolagyasha|bolagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobolagnkshĂ«sha|gobolagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobolagnkrosha|gobolagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobolagnkmusha|gobolagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobolagnkyasha|gobolagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bolalagasha|bolalagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bolalagshĂ«sha|bolalagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bolalagrosha|bolalagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bolalagmusha|bolalagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bolalagyasha|bolalagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobolalagnkshĂ«sha|gobolalagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobolalagnkrosha|gobolalagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobolalagnkmusha|gobolalagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobolalagnkyasha|gobolalagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:belĂŠgasha|belĂŠgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:belĂŠgshĂ«sha|belĂŠgshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:belĂŠgrosha|belĂŠgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:belĂŠgmusha|belĂŠgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:belĂŠgyasha|belĂŠgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobelĂŠgnkshĂ«sha|gobelĂŠgnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobelĂŠgnkrosha|gobelĂŠgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobelĂŠgnkmusha|gobelĂŠgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobelĂŠgnkyasha|gobelĂŠgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bolfagasha|bolfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bolfagshĂ«sha|bolfagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bolfagrosha|bolfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bolfagmusha|bolfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bolfagyasha|bolfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobolfagnkshĂ«sha|gobolfagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobolfagnkrosha|gobolfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobolfagnkmusha|gobolfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobolfagnkyasha|gobolfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
